array_types.name: AFRH_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type AFRH_Field_Array is array (8 .. 15) of AFRH_Element
  with Component_Size => 4, Size => 32;

array_types.name: AFRL_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type AFRL_Field_Array is array (0 .. 7) of AFRL_Element
  with Component_Size => 4, Size => 32;

array_types.name: BRR_BR_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type BRR_BR_Field_Array is array (0 .. 15) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 16;

array_types.name: BSRR_BR_Field_Array

  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 16;

array_types.name: LCKR_LCK_Field_Array

array_types.name: MODER_Field_Array

array_types.name: ODR_Field_Array

array_types.name: OSPEEDR_Field_Array

array_types.name: OTYPER_OT_Field_Array

array_types.name: PUPDR_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type PUPDR_Field_Array is array (0 .. 15) of PUPDR_Element
  with Component_Size => 2, Size => 32;

fields.name: BS
fields.description: Write-only. Port x set bit y (y= 0..15)
